laws.title: District Improvement Act (DIA)
laws.status_basis: The plan classifies the enactment as repealed and nonoperative, so it stays in statutory history only.

current_implementation.detail: No current Code insertion or branch XML change is expected.

laws.recommended_action: Leave out of the Code; retain only as repealed public-law history.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The plan classifies the enactment as repealed and nonoperative, so it stays in statutory history only.

laws.title: The Federal Pay Standardization Act
laws.status_basis: The source is already integrated in the current branch, and the chronology ties it to the shared 5 U.S.C. 5332 pay-table sequence.

current_implementation.detail: Current branch contains the incorporated amendment.

laws.chronology_conclusion: The source is already integrated in the current branch, and the chronology ties it to the shared 5 U.S.C. 5332 pay-table sequence.

laws.title: Literally Introducing Taxes (LIT)

laws.chronology_conclusion: The source is already present in the branch as the 26 U.S.C. 1 tax text and history note.

laws.chronology_conclusion: The act is predominantly temporary or self-expiring, so it remains public-law history only.

laws.title: Literally Fixing Taxes
laws.status_basis: The law is repealed and the current branch already preserves it only as statutory history.

current_implementation.detail: Historical note is already present in the current branch.

laws.recommended_action: Keep the statutory-history note only; do not restore any live Code text.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The law is repealed and the current branch already preserves it only as statutory history.

laws.title: Protecting Working Americans
laws.status_basis: The source text directly revises the pay-scale language established by the prior pay-standardization law, and the chronology links it to the same 5 U.S.C. 5332 target sequence as PL-032-230 and PL-032-232.

current_implementation.detail: The branch review does not show the pay-table rewrite integrated; the earlier 2 U.S.C. 29 anchor is not supported by the source text.

laws.recommended_action: Apply the Section 3 pay-scale amendment at 5 U.S.C. 5332; do not route it to 2 U.S.C. 29.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source text directly revises the pay-scale language established by the prior pay-standardization law, and the chronology links it to the same 5 U.S.C. 5332 target sequence as PL-032-230 and PL-032-232.

laws.title: Public Law 34-243 | Judicial Integrity & Accountability Act
laws.status_basis: This is a direct chapter-level rewrite to Title 28 chapter 16, and the branch already carries the enacted replacement text.

current_implementation.detail: Current XML includes the replacement chapter 16 framework and repeal markers for sections 359 and 361.

laws.recommended_action: No further Code change is required.
laws.chronology_conclusion: This is a direct chapter-level rewrite to Title 28 chapter 16, and the branch already carries the enacted replacement text.

laws.title: Public Law 34-244 | Sentencing Reform Act

laws.chronology_conclusion: The act directly amends 18 U.S.C. 3585, and the current branch already contains the revised text.
